info.title: SaaS Platform API
info.description: Generated contract foundation for local QA and Claude Design frontend handoff. This pass enumerates routes and product tags before detailed DTO schema hardening.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication, current user and invitation entry points.

tags.name: Tenancy
tags.description: Tenant access, memberships, products, feature flags and invitations.

tags.name: Commercial
tags.description: Plans, subscriptions, entitlements and product access.

tags.name: Invoicing
tags.description: Invoices, customers, payments and Ecuador electronic invoicing surfaces.

tags.name: Ecommerce
tags.description: Store setup, product authoring, launch, order and post-sale workflows.

tags.name: Growth
tags.description: Conversations, WhatsApp operations, leads, opportunities and operational cases.

tags.name: Tax Compliance EC
tags.description: Ecuador tax compliance, SRI evidence, declaration and accountant-boundary flows.

tags.name: Accounting
tags.description: Accounting foundation, advanced accounting and Full Accounting closeout contracts.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI agent catalog, prompts, memory, suggestions, approvals and guarded execution.

tags.name: Medical Clinics
tags.description: Medical clinic activation, appointments, clinical records and closeout workflows.

tags.name: Psychology Clinics
tags.description: Psychology clinic activation, sessions, clinical records and closeout workflows.
